today.comeBackOnStartDate: Come back on the start date to clock in for this job.
today.onDemandScheduleDescription: Arrive at {{address}} at {{arriveTime}} and work according to your communications with the company until the job is complete.
today.recurringScheduleDescription: This job repeats weekly on the selected days. Work the same schedule each week.
today.oneDayAssignmentDescription: This is a single-day assignment. Complete the work on the scheduled date.
today.onDemandSummary: Clock in when you arrive and work until the job is complete.
today.recurringSummary: Work {{days}} days per week, same time each day.
today.reassigningWorkerRateNotice: Reassigning a worker will not change the job's hourly rate.
today.reassignWorkerDescription: {{title}} - Choose who should work this job
today.followStepsToFix: Follow the steps below to fix this issue.
today.gpsSignalWeak: GPS signal may be weak. Try moving to an open area or near a window.
today.locationErrorIosPermissionStep2: Scroll down and tap Safari (or your browser)
today.locationErrorIosPermissionStep4: Return to this app and try again
today.locationErrorIosTimeoutStep1: Make sure you have a clear view of the sky
today.locationErrorIosTimeoutStep2: Check that Location Services is enabled in Settings > Privacy > Location Services
today.locationErrorIosTimeoutStep3: Try moving to an area with better GPS signal
today.locationErrorIosTimeoutStep4: Restart the app and try again
today.locationErrorIosUnsupportedStep1: Go to Settings > Privacy > Location Services
today.locationErrorIosUnsupportedStep2: Make sure Location Services is turned ON
today.locationErrorIosUnsupportedStep3: Find your browser in the list and set to 'While Using'
today.locationErrorIosUnsupportedStep4: Return to this app and try again
today.locationErrorAndroidPermissionStep3: Find and tap your browser app
today.locationErrorAndroidPermissionStep5: Return to this app and try again
today.locationErrorAndroidTimeoutStep1: Make sure you have a clear view of the sky
today.locationErrorAndroidTimeoutStep2: Go to Settings > Location and ensure it's ON
today.locationErrorAndroidTimeoutStep4: Try moving to an area with better GPS signal
today.locationErrorAndroidUnsupportedStep2: Make sure Location is turned ON
today.locationErrorAndroidUnsupportedStep3: Set mode to 'High accuracy' for best results
today.locationErrorAndroidUnsupportedStep4: Return to this app and try again
today.locationErrorBrowserPermissionStep1: Click the lock/info icon in your browser's address bar
today.locationErrorBrowserPermissionStep4: Refresh the page and try again
today.locationErrorBrowserTimeoutStep1: Check that your device has GPS or location services
today.locationErrorBrowserTimeoutStep3: If on a desktop, location may be less accurate
today.locationErrorBrowserTimeoutStep4: Consider using a mobile device for better GPS
today.locationErrorBrowserUnsupportedStep1: Check your browser settings for location permissions
today.locationErrorBrowserUnsupportedStep2: Make sure location services are enabled on your device
today.locationErrorBrowserUnsupportedStep4: Consider using a mobile device for better GPS

acceptedJob.jobMayHaveBeenRemoved: Este trabajo pudo haber sido eliminado o no tienes acceso a él.

home.heroDescription: Hire verified, skilled workers on-demand across construction, manufacturing, retail, events, and more. Post a job today, get workers on-site tomorrow. Zero long-term commitments.
home.reduceLaborCosts: Reduce labor costs by up to 40%
home.payOnlyForHoursWorked: Pay only for hours worked. No benefits, insurance, or payroll taxes.
home.stopLosingProjects: Stop losing projects to labor shortages
home.actionableSolutions: Actionable solutions that solve your biggest staffing challenges.
home.fillShiftsInHours: Fill shifts in hours, not weeks
home.fillShiftsDescription: Post a job at 8 AM, have workers on-site by 2 PM. No more waiting weeks for temp agencies or scrambling for last-minute help.
home.cutLaborCostsDescription: No benefits, insurance, or payroll taxes. Pay only for hours worked. Automatic replenishment keeps your account funded.
home.everyWorkerVerifiedDescription: Background checks, identity verification, and ratings from previous employers. We handle compliance so you don't have to.
home.gpsLocationVerificationDescription: Automatic clock-in/out when workers arrive at job sites. Real-time tracking ensures you're paying for actual work time.
home.quickbooksReadyExportsDescription: Download timesheet data, invoices, and payment records. Seamless integration with your accounting software.
home.scaleUpOrDownInstantlyDescription: Need 10 workers for a big project? Need 1 for a quick fix? Post once, get multiple qualified candidates instantly.
home.weServeEveryIndustry: We serve every industry that needs skilled labor
home.fromConstructionSites: From construction sites to event venues, we've got the workers you need.
home.fromSignupToFirstWorker: From signup to your first worker on-site in under 24 hours.
home.createYourAccountDescription: Complete onboarding in 5 minutes. Add a $2,000 deposit (auto-replenishes at $200). Upload your W-9 and you're ready to post jobs.
home.postYourFirstJobDescription: Specify trade, location, hours needed, and rate. Our platform instantly notifies matching workers in your area.
home.hireAndManageDescription: Review worker profiles, ratings, and experience. Accept applications, communicate via in-app messaging, and track hours in real-time.
home.averageCostSavings: Average cost savings vs. full-time employees
home.fromJobPostToWorker: From job post to worker on-site
home.roiDescription: Stop losing projects because you can't find workers. Stop paying for benefits and insurance when you only need help for a few days. Start hiring smarter today.

strikes.threeStrikePolicyDescription: Receiving 3 strikes will result in being permanently banned from the Tolstoy Staffing platform. Strikes are issued for no-shows, unprofessional conduct, timesheet fraud, or other policy violations.
strikes.keepUpGreatWork: Keep up the great work! Maintaining professionalism helps build your reputation.
strikes.contactSupportIfError: If you believe a strike was issued in error, please contact Tolstoy Staffing support to review your case. Strikes may be removed at our discretion after investigation.

workerDocuments.insuranceDescription: Verified insurance shows companies you're protected against job site liability. Workers with verified insurance get more job opportunities.

workerDocuments.identityVerificationScopeNote: Esto comprueba que tu identificación es auténtica y coincide con tu foto. No es una verificación de antecedentes penales, de crédito ni un informe de selección de personal.

businessOperator.invitedToJoinAsTeamMember: You've been invited to join as a team member on Tolstoy Staffing
businessOperator.becomeABusinessOperatorDescription: Add your whole team to your instance. Set hourly rates for each worker, manage their skillsets, and apply for jobs on their behalf. All payments for work your teammates do will go to your account for you to manage.
businessOperator.buildYourTeamDescription: Add team members with their info, avatar, and assign them as Admin or Employee. Admins have the same powers as you. Employees only see Jobs and Calendar tabs.
businessOperator.setIndividualRatesDescription: Control the hourly rate for each team member. You decide what they earn per job.
businessOperator.expandedJobMatchingDescription: Jobs will be filtered based on your combined team skills. See more opportunities with a diverse team.
businessOperator.allPaymentsToYouDescription: When team members work jobs, all payments go directly to your account. You manage payouts to your team individually.
businessOperator.manageYourCrewAndRates: Manage your crew and their rates
businessOperator.facePhotoRequiredToBeOperational: Foto de rostro requerida para estar operativo
businessOperator.facePhotoRequiredDescription: Este trabajador necesita una foto de rostro para estar operativo. Puede subir una aquí, compartir el enlace de incorporación o enviarles un correo para que suban la suya.
businessOperator.addFirstTeamMemberDescription: Add your first team member to start applying for jobs on their behalf
businessOperator.paymentFlowDescription: How payments work when you apply for jobs with team members
businessOperator.paymentFlowStep1Description: When you apply for jobs, you can select team members to work on the job. Their individual hourly rate is used for the application.
businessOperator.paymentFlowStep2Description: All payments from completed jobs are deposited directly to your business operator account. You receive the full payment amount.
businessOperator.paymentFlowStep3Description: You control when and how much to pay your team members. Manage payouts directly from your account settings.
businessOperator.paymentFlowNote: All payments are processed through your account. You have full control over team member payouts.
businessOperator.onboardingLinkInfoDescription: Share this link with your team member to allow them to complete their onboarding. The link will only work after you have set their role and hourly rate.
businessOperator.onboardingLinkNotReady: The onboarding link will be available after you set the team member's role and hourly rate, and save the changes.
businessOperator.setRoleRequired: Set the team member's role (admin or employee)
businessOperator.setHourlyRateRequired: Set the team member's hourly rate
businessOperator.inviteTokenRequired: Save the team member to generate an invite link
businessOperator.onboardingLinkInfoExplanation: Share this link with potential team members so they can independently fill out the onboarding questionnaire to join your team.
businessOperator.onboardingLinkStep1Description: Copy and share the onboarding link with potential team members via email, text, or any messaging platform.
businessOperator.onboardingLinkStep2Description: When someone clicks the link, they'll see the same onboarding questionnaire you use. They can fill it out independently with their information.
businessOperator.onboardingLinkStep3Description: Once they complete the onboarding form, they'll automatically be added to your team as a pending member. You can then review and activate them.
businessOperator.clearFacePhotoRequired: A clear face photo is required for verification
businessOperator.theyWillReceiveInvitation: They'll receive an invitation to create their account
businessOperator.whereTeamMemberIsBased: Where this team member is based
businessOperator.locationHelpsMatchJobs: Location helps match them with nearby jobs
businessOperator.chooseAccessLevel: Choose what access level this team member will have:
businessOperator.employeeDescription: Can only view Jobs and Calendar tabs. See their accepted jobs and work schedule.
businessOperator.adminDescription: Full access like you. Can manage team, apply for jobs, and access all features.
businessOperator.chooseServicesTeamMemberCanPerform: Choose the services this team member can perform
businessOperator.adminRoleDescription: Admins can manage team, apply for jobs, and access all features
businessOperator.employeeRoleDescription: Employees only see Jobs and Calendar tabs with their accepted jobs
businessOperator.selectSkillsThatMatchExperience: Select the skills that match this team member's experience

enhancedJobDialog.onDemandTooltip: Flexible timing - work when you're available. Clock in anytime during the job period.
enhancedJobDialog.recurringTooltip: Regular scheduled work. This job repeats on a regular schedule - great for steady income.
enhancedJobDialog.oneTimeTooltip: Single day job with fixed start and end time. Complete the work in one session.

enhancedJobDialog.thisJobNeedsWorkers: This job needs {{count}} workers. Select who you want to apply for:

enhancedJobDialog.contactInfoWillBeRemoved: Note: Contact info will be automatically removed for safety.

enhancedJobDialog.tellThemWhyYoureAGreatFit: Tell them why you're a great fit for this job...
enhancedJobDialog.contactInfoAutomaticallyRemoved: Contact info is automatically removed for your protection
enhancedJobDialog.clockInAnytimeDuringJobPeriod: Clock in anytime during the job period
enhancedJobDialog.knowExactlyWhenDone: Know exactly when you'll be done
enhancedJobDialog.haveRelevantExperience: Have relevant experience in this area
enhancedJobDialog.bePreparedToDemonstrateSkills: Be prepared to demonstrate your skills
enhancedJobDialog.askQuestionsIfNeeded: Ask questions if you need clarification

enhancedJobDialog.fullAddressWhenSelected: You'll get the full address when you're selected for this project.
enhancedJobDialog.clockInToStartTracking: Clock in to start tracking your time
enhancedJobDialog.confirmWithdrawMessage: You selected "{{reason}}". Are you sure you want to withdraw your application? This cannot be undone.
enhancedJobDialog.chooseTeamMemberForJob: Choose a team member for this job
enhancedJobDialog.reassigningWorkerRateUnchanged: Reassigning {{name}}. The rate will remain unchanged.
enhancedJobDialog.appliedRateWillRemainUnchanged: The applied rate of ${{rate}}/hr will remain unchanged when reassigning this job.

workerDashboard.trackApplicationsAndWork: Track your applications and upcoming work
workerDashboard.applicationStatusHint: Each tab is an application status. After you're accepted, clock in from Today. Payout timing: Menu → Payment history & Payout settings.
workerDashboard.findWorkTimeoutDescription: The server took too long to respond. Try again, widen your search radius in Quick Settings, or check your connection.
workerDashboard.applyToJobsToSeeThem: Apply to jobs to see them here
workerDashboard.whenCompaniesAcceptApplications: When companies accept your applications, they'll appear here
workerDashboard.confirmedJobsDescription: You've been selected for these jobs. Check the details for when and where to show up.
workerDashboard.applicationsBeingReviewed: These applications are being reviewed by companies. You'll be notified when they respond.
workerDashboard.applicationsNotSelected: These applications weren't selected. Don't worry - keep applying to find the right match!
workerDashboard.noMessagesYet: Aún no hay mensajes. ¡Inicia la conversación!
workerDashboard.noJobsAvailableRightNow: No hay trabajos disponibles en este momento
workerDashboard.checkBackSoonNewJobsPostedDaily: ¡Vuelve pronto! Se publican nuevos trabajos diariamente.

myApplications.subtitle: Consulta y sigue el estado de tus solicitudes. Toca una fila para abrir el trabajo.
